expectations.text: Has main section with name: order-service, logger, registry_type
expectations.evidence: main section present with name: order-service, logger: zerolog, registry_type: github

expectations.text: Has git section with repo and module_path
expectations.evidence: git section has repo and module_path for github.com/mycompany/order-service

expectations.text: Has REST ogen transport with path to swagger
expectations.evidence: rest api with generator_type: ogen, path: [./api.swagger.yml], port: 8080

expectations.text: Has sys transport with template generator
expectations.evidence: sys transport with generator_type: template, generator_template: sys, port: 9090

expectations.text: Has jsonschema section for typed messages
expectations.evidence: jsonschema section with name: orders, two schemas with id and path

expectations.text: Has kafka producer with events referencing jsonschema
expectations.evidence: kafka producer with events order_created/order_updated, schema: orders.order_created/orders.order_updated

expectations.text: Has application with transport in object format and kafka ref
expectations.evidence: application 'server' with transport [{name: api}, {name: sys}] and kafka [order_producer]

expectations.text: Transport uses object format (- name: x) not string format
expectations.evidence: Transport uses - name: api and - name: sys format

expectations.text: All defined entities are used in applications
expectations.evidence: Both REST transports and kafka producer referenced in server application
